title: Add PollenStudio: AI Variation Gallery to image
author: pollinations-ai[bot]

gist.headline: The gallery expands
gist.blurb: Another beautiful addition to the Greenhouse. PollenStudio is a new AI variation gallery built by the community, perfect for when you need to see your prompt from every possible angle.
gist.summary: Added PollenStudio, a new AI variation gallery built by souravhchoursiya, to the community apps showcase.
gist.impact: Users can now explore and generate image variations through the newly featured PollenStudio app in the Greenhouse.
gist.visual_concept: An art gallery setting representing 'PollenStudio'. Polly the bee acting as a curator or artist, showing off framed variations of an image to the Monitor Robot. Emphasizes the 'variation gallery' aspect.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny painter's beret, guiding a chunky monitor-head robot through a warm, wooden art gallery. The walls are lined with framed pixel-art variations of glowing landscapes. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny painter's beret, guiding a chunky monitor-head robot through a warm, wooden art gallery. The walls are lined with framed pixel-art variations of glowing landscapes. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
